title: trichospermum grewiifolium
intro: Trichospermum grewiifolium, also known as Long Pepper or Pipal, is a plant species belonging to the family Celastraceae. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Long Pepper has several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and fighting against various infections. Herbal preparations of Trichospermum grewiifolium can be made into teas, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to alleviate various health issues.
